parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen layout. The top half is an AI-generated animated avatar with typical 3D-rendered features, smooth movements, and lip-syncing. The bottom half is a human-recorded video of a woman speaking to the camera.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, young adult. Fair complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a neat updo. She has a smooth, stylized appearance typical of modern 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: A light green turtleneck sweater and small gold stud earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult human female. Fair complexion, long straight dark brown hair, and dark eyes. She has a natural, unstyled look.
characters.wardrobe: A dark, possibly black or navy, turtleneck sweater.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant when speaking, and engaged in the conversation.

scenes.setting: Top panel: A stylized, softly lit room with a blurred background featuring a lamp and a potted plant. Bottom panel: A dimly lit room with a wooden ceiling and a wall with some photos pinned to it.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman with reddish-brown hair in an updo is framed from the chest up. She wears a light green turtleneck and gold stud earrings. Her expression is friendly and animated as she speaks. The background is softly blurred, showing a warm-toned room with a lamp on the left and a large green potted plant on the right. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting her features.

A young woman with long dark hair is framed from the chest up, looking directly at the camera. She wears a dark turtleneck sweater. Her expression is focused and slightly hesitant as she speaks. The background is a dimly lit room with a slanted wooden ceiling. Behind her, a wall is visible with several small photographs pinned to it. The lighting is somewhat uneven, with shadows on her face.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a split-screen video call. The top half shows a 3D animated female avatar acting as a tutor, while the bottom half shows a real human woman acting as a student. They are engaged in a conversation, with the tutor correcting the student's Italian. Subtitles appear in the center of the screen, translating the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Parli italiano? [Do you speak Italian?]
Character B says: Sì, un po'. Io sono fame. [Yes, a little. I am hunger.]
Character A says: No, no. Si dice: ho fame. In italiano non sei fame, hai fame. [No, no. You say: I have hunger. In Italian you are not hunger, you have hunger.]
Character B says: Ho fame. [I have hunger.]
Character A says: Cosa vuoi mangiare? [What do you want to eat?]
Character B says: Voglio il pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: Attenta: la pizza. Pizza è femminile. [Careful: the pizza. Pizza is feminine.]
Character B says: Voglio la pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: E da bere? [And to drink?]
Character B says: Voglio uno acqua. [I want a water.]
Character A says: Meglio: vorrei un'acqua, per favore. Più educato. [Better: I would like a water, please. More polite.]
Character B says: Vorrei un'acqua, per favore. [I would like a water, please.]
Character A says: Perfetto! Vedi, il tuo italiano sta migliorando. [Perfect! See, your Italian is improving.]
Character B says: Grazie. Ma chi sei tu? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: Sono una tutor AI su Praktika. Parliamo così ogni giorno e il tuo italiano diventerà perfetto. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We speak like this every day and your Italian will become perfect.]
Character B says: Ok, proverò Praktika adesso. [Ok, I will try Praktika now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background with no characters or props.

scenes.visual_description: A white screen displays the Praktika app logo in the center. Below the logo, the website URL 'praktika.ai' is shown. At the bottom, there are two app store badges: 'GET IT ON Google Play' and 'Available on the App Store'.
